summary: CMR Module Phase 2 Testing Complete - FRK Purchase, Paddy Custody Register, Milling Report Exports. All backend APIs working (16/16 tests passed). Fixed critical bug in milling-report/excel endpoint. Frontend UI verified with all 4 sub-tabs functional.

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing - no residual test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMR Module Phase 2 fully tested. New APIs: POST/GET/DELETE /api/frk-purchases, GET /api/frk-stock, GET /api/paddy-custody-register, GET /api/milling-report/excel, GET /api/milling-report/pdf, GET /api/paddy-custody-register/excel. FRK is now purchased separately (not in milling entry). Milling entries use frk_used_qntl from stock. CMR = rice_qntl + frk_used_qntl. Frontend has 4 sub-tabs: subtab-milling, subtab-frk, subtab-byproducts, subtab-custody. Key data-testid: frk-add-btn, frk-form-dialog, frk-form-party, frk-form-qty, frk-form-rate, milling-form-frk-used, milling-export-excel, milling-export-pdf, custody-export-excel.

bug_fixed.fix: Replaced ws.columns iteration with explicit column range using get_column_letter()

verified_business_logic.running_balance: balance += received - issued for each row

milling_entries_api: POST with frk_used_qntl, verify CMR calculation
integration_test: Full flow: FRK purchase -> Milling entry -> Stock update -> CMR verification
